title: Sequelize Querying Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on advanced querying operations in Sequelize.

questions.question: Which method is used to find a record by its primary key?
Which Sequelize object is used to perform advanced filtering with operators like 'greater than' or 'like'?
What property is used to limit the number of records returned in a query?
What property is used for sorting the results of a query?
What property is used to specify which columns to retrieve in a query?
